text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho and I begin cleaning up after
training, when...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, Familiar. Do you think we're finished
already? You still don't get me at all, do you?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you see me using magic when we started
training?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I cast an energy spell on someone in my class
today, and she was super happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's right, I should try using the same spell on
myself! Dimordimor photheca!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I cast an energy spell on myself! That means I can
keep running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is being unusually proactive about
her training. I'm glad she's channeling this extra
energy into running, but...
choice_data_list: All right, let's do some extra laps!

Let's use that energy for something other than
running!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now you're talking. ♪ I can handle anything
you got today!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! I'll cast the energy spell on you too!
On the house! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Dimordimor photheca! ☆ Inner energy, come
forth!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That should keep you going for a while! Now, run
with me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
My spell was perfect, so it'll be fine! Now, hurry
up before I leave you behind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is in a good mood all day and fully
commits to training.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
choice_data_list: Like making a new spell or something.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wow, that's not a bad idea, for a familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... If I'm going to make a new spell, the
first thing we've gotta do is draw some magic
circles and test them out!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: All right, let's get to the experiments!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing?! Hurry up and get over here!
You're my familiar, so you're supposed to help me
out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We draw magic circles until the sun sets, yet I
don't feel a hint of exhaustion.
